creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@findsaltcamp, the cutest and pinkiest winter pop-up in Dubai, is back! 💕

Salt Camp is a cool and Instagrammable pop-up concept by @findsalt. It is located right across Emirates Towers, a short walk from Museum of the Future. 

What to have:
🍔 Wagyu Burgers! We had the Wagyu Proper Burger (61 AED). The Camp Fire Burger which we had last year remains our fave though.
🍟 Comfort food like truffle fries and grilled corn. Starters at 35 AED onwards.
🍦Unique desserts! We had the Lotus Can (41 AED). Sweet and shareable! 
🤎 I skipped the hot chocolate this time, but I had it in the camp 2 years ago and loved it as well! 

Tag your foodie buddies!

#FindSalt #SaltCamp #museumofthefuture

transcription.text: If we never try, how will we know? Baby, how far do you think we'll go? Give me a sign, if I'm on your mind I don't wanna fall
